ANNEX 2 - Non Disclosure Agreement

WITNESSES

WHEREAS, the Parties wish to pursue exploratory discussions concerning possible collaborations between them in relation to project XXX .WHEREAS, during the performance of this Purchasing Frame Contract, it will become necessary for the Parties hereto to disclose to each other certain technical, financial or business information of a proprietary or confidential nature, hereinafter referred to as “Proprietary Information”; and

c1f1afdc-55ee-4e6d-8a19-4223fdaa014c.label: text_chunk
c1f1afdc-55ee-4e6d-8a19-4223fdaa014c.text:
WHEREAS, the Parties hereto are willing to provide for the conditions of such disclosure of Proprietary Information and the rules governing the use and the protection there of;

NOW, THEREFORE, THE PARTIES AGREE AS FOLLOWS:

DEFTA Purchasing department 2016

ANNEX 2 - Non Disclosure Agreement

1.

 As used in this Agreement the term "Proprietary Information" shall mean any information or data disclosed by any Party to  the other,

fa6d5ec0-e4df-4fbc-8594-7a0e422d48df.label: text_chunk
fa6d5ec0-e4df-4fbc-8594-7a0e422d48df.text:
pursuant to this Agreement, either in writing or orally, subject to the conditions set forth hereafter, and including  without limitation any written or printed documents (plans, drawings, photographs, etc…), samples prototypes, models, technology, kno w- how, specifications, software, commercial or financial information or any means of disclosing such Proprietary Information th at each Party may elect to use during the life of this Agreement.

2.

7d509cd0-2e75-4e3f-8500-c4b86ef04ed9.label: text_chunk
7d509cd0-2e75-4e3f-8500-c4b86ef04ed9.text: Nothing in this Agreement may be construed as compelling any Party hereto to disclose any Proprietary Information to the o ther, or to enter into any further contractual relationships.3. Each Party, to the extent of its right to do so, shall disclose to the other Party the Proprietary Information which are a ppropriate to fulfil the objectives of this Agreement as set up in the recitals.

f6ff84b3-dd12-4588-83cf-2558d14138fa.label: text_chunk
f6ff84b3-dd12-4588-83cf-2558d14138fa.text: The Parties hereby represent that the disclosure of Propri etary Information by and between themselves is not contrary to the laws and regulations of their respective countries.4. The receiving Party hereby covenants that, during the validity period of this Agreement and for a period of five (5) years after its end or its termination, the Proprietary Information received from the disclosing Party shall:

a919eadf-5cc0-4855-9608-891b129f4a5b.label: text_chunk
a919eadf-5cc0-4855-9608-891b129f4a5b.text:
(a) be protected and kept in strict confidence by the receiving Party which must use the same degree of precaution and safegu ards as it uses to protect its own proprietary information of like importance, but in no case any less than reasonable care,


(b) be only disclosed to and used by those persons who have a need to know and solely for the purpose specified in this Agreement, within the receiving Party's organisation and to its professional advisors,

713c1ce4-2790-45a7-acb6-17385fb1f83c.label: text_chunk
713c1ce4-2790-45a7-acb6-17385fb1f83c.text:
provided that in this latter case the  disclosing Party so notifies the other Party and obtains the authorization from the other Party to make such disclosure, such authorizat ion not being unreasonably withheld, and provided that such advisor(s) agree(s) to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

 (Buyer shall be entitled to freely disclose such information to its affiliated companies, to its co -contractors for a project and to its final customer).

c6c2f99e-fa06-42b1-b0d4-7a93f24139c7.label: text_chunk
c6c2f99e-fa06-42b1-b0d4-7a93f24139c7.text: (c) not be used in whole or in part for any purpose other than the purpose of this Agreement as specified in the preamble and for the Project above without the prior written consent of the disclosing Party,

8b2dde38-6de2-4f4a-9888-0a0b862d08d6.label: text_chunk
8b2dde38-6de2-4f4a-9888-0a0b862d08d6.text:
(d) neither be disclosed nor caused to be disclosed whether directly or indirectly to any third Party or persons other than t hose mentioned in subparagraph b) or the Buyer Clients or its co -contractors for the Project,
(e) neither be copied, nor otherwise reproduced nor duplicated in whole or in part where such copying, reproduction or duplic ation have not been specifically authorized in writing by the disclosing Party.5.

9c81e920-1591-4a68-94a9-1fd0d803ba7c.label: text_chunk
9c81e920-1591-4a68-94a9-1fd0d803ba7c.text:
Any Proprietary Information and copies thereof disclosed by either Party to the other shall remain the property of the dis closing Party and shall be returned by the receiving Party immediately upon request.The above provisions shall not apply to the Proprietary Information disclosed by the Supplier to the Buyer and which fall und er clause 12.2 of the General Purchase Conditions.6.

 Except as aforementioned,

8ec332b2-5e90-4db2-9d04-eeb046e26240.label: text_chunk
8ec332b2-5e90-4db2-9d04-eeb046e26240.text:
the receiving Party shall have no obligations or restrictions with respect to any Proprietary Information which that receiving Party can prove:
DEFTA Purchasing department 2016

ANNEX 2 - Non Disclosure Agreement

(a) has come into the public domain prior to, or after the disclosure thereof and in such case through no wrongful act of tha t receiving Party, or
(b) is already known to the receiving Party, as evidenced by written documentation in the files of the receiving Party,

or
(c) has been lawfully received from a third party without restrictions or breach of this Agreement, or

(d) has been or is published without violation of this Agreement, or

 is published without violation of this Agreement, or
(e) is independently developed in good faith by an employee or employees of that receiving Party who did not have access to t he Proprietary Information, or
(f) is approved for release or use by written authorization of the disclosing Party.8.

35032805-7b74-4f57-bbf7-440ffbef6cfa.label: text_chunk
35032805-7b74-4f57-bbf7-440ffbef6cfa.text: 2 of the General Purchase Conditions,  it is expressly understood and agreed by the Par ties hereto that the disclosure and provision of Proprietary Information under this Agreement by a Party to the other Party shall  not be construed as granting to the receiving Party under the laws of any country any rights whether expressed or implied by licence or otherwise on the matters, inventions or discoveries to which such Proprietary Information pertains or any copyright, trademar k or trade secret rights.

ba8a45ed-8983-41e8-ac1e-029002e1e151.label: text_chunk
ba8a45ed-8983-41e8-ac1e-029002e1e151.text: The property in all information and/or data disclosed by the Buyer to the Supplier pursuant to this Agreement shall subject t o any right of any other owner, rest with the Buyer.9. This Agreement shall enter into force on the date of its signature and shall be valid for a term of 5(five) years.10.

462a6a9f-3f46-4097-9948-038bcebb42ca.label: text_chunk
462a6a9f-3f46-4097-9948-038bcebb42ca.text: The execution, existence and performance of this Agreement shall be kept confidential by the Parties hereto and shall not be disclosed by either Party without the prior written consent of the other.11. The end or termination of this Agreement shall not relieve the receiving Party of complying with the obligations imposed  by paragraph 4 thereof with respect to the use and protection of the Proprietary Information received prior to the date of termi nation or end of this Agreement.

45758a38-5a27-4c51-92b2-928310cf1778.label: text_chunk
45758a38-5a27-4c51-92b2-928310cf1778.text: Such obligations shall continue for the period applicable as set forth in said paragraph.12. This Contract shall be governed by Buyer country laws and its appropriate courts of Paris. It is expressly agreed that if any dispute should arise, the competent jurisdiction of Paris in France shall be the sole competent jurisdiction.13. The effective date of this Agreement shall be the date on which it is executed by all Parties hereto.

community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. Its primary purpose is to enhance protections for whistleblowers, ensuring that individuals who report misconduct or illegal activities are safeguarded from retaliation. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.
community_summary.20: The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is connected to Title 5 through their shared status as components of the United States Code. community_summary.21: The relationship between Government agents and the Subversive Activities Act of 1950 is characterized by protective measures. community_summary.22:
The relationships involving the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) highlight the management and ownership dynamics surrounding this sensitive information category. 

1. **PCII and PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, ensuring its operations and compliance. This indicates a management relationship where the Program Manager plays a crucial role in the program's governance.

2. **Authorization by PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager holds the authority to authorize any changes or removals of PCII, establishing a direct and significant relationship between the manager and the information category.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

In summary, the PCII Program Manager is central to the management and authorization processes of PCII, while the United States Government holds ownership, underscoring the importance of governance and compliance in handling this critical information.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Sensitive but Unclassified Information" and "Section 552a of Title 5" highlights the legal framework that safeguards individual privacy rights. Specifically, Section 552a of Title 5 governs sensitive but unclassified information, establishing the necessary protections for personal privacy. This relationship underscores the importance of legal guidelines in managing and protecting sensitive information that does not meet the criteria for classified status but still requires careful handling to ensure privacy rights are upheld.
community_summary.24:
The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and enforcement dynamics between the United States Government and an Authorized Entity concerning DHS Form 11000-6 and Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII).

1. **Regulation of DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which pertains to the handling and safeguarding of information under specific agreements.

2. **Authorization of the Authorized Entity**: The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity, enabling it to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

3. **Enforcement Mechanisms**: The United States Government retains the right to seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, establishing a legal oversight relationship.

In summary, the United States Government plays a crucial role in regulating information handling through DHS Form 11000-6, authorizing an entity to manage sensitive information, and enforcing compliance to maintain the integrity of agreements related to critical infrastructure information.

The relationships outlined highlight significant connections between various legal frameworks and protections concerning disclosures and employee rights.

1. **Executive Order No. 12958 and Section 7211 of Title 5**: Both establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, emphasizing the importance of transparency and accountability in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

2. **Section 1034 of Title 10 and the Military Whistleblower Protection Act**: Section 1034 specifically protects military members who disclose information, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, illustrating a strong commitment to safeguarding the rights of military personnel in reporting misconduct or wrongdoing.

In summary, these relationships underscore the critical role of legal provisions in ensuring that both civilian and military employees are protected when making disclosures, thereby promoting a culture of accountability and integrity within government and military operations.
community_summary.28: The relationships highlight the involvement of the entity SBU in the assignment of royalties and remunerations to the United States Government. Both relationships indicate that SBU operates similarly to SSI in this context, emphasizing its role in managing financial agreements as outlined in a specific Agreement with the government. This underscores SBU's significant function in the financial dealings related to government assignments.
community_summary.29: The relationship between "Conflict of Interest" and "Chair" emphasizes the importance of transparency and accountability in governance. Specifically, it is the responsibility of the interested party to declare any conflict of interest directly to the Chair. This highlights a critical communication protocol where the Chair is informed of potential biases or conflicts, ensuring that the presiding officer is aware of any issues that may affect decision-making. The repeated nature of this relationship underscores its significance in maintaining ethical standards within organizational structures.
community_summary.30: The relationship between the Board and Board Members is characterized by the Board's authority to remove a Board Member after providing notice. This highlights a governance and oversight dynamic, where the Board maintains control over its members to ensure accountability and adherence to its standards. The removal process underscores the Board's role in maintaining its integrity and operational effectiveness.
community_summary.31: The relationships highlight two interconnected infrastructure repair projects in the Corral Canyon area: the Corral Canyon Road Bridge Repairs and the Corral Canyon Culvert Repairs. Both projects are part of initiatives led by FEMA and CalOES, focusing on addressing various types of damage to the infrastructure. The emphasis is on the collaborative effort to restore and enhance the safety and functionality of the road and bridge systems in this region.

**Summary of Relationships:**

Clover Heights is associated with a Storm Drain project that has been specifically designed to address flooding issues in the area. This relationship highlights the significance of the storm drain as a crucial infrastructure initiative aimed at mitigating flooding concerns in Clover Heights.
community_summary.33: The Woolsey Fire has a significant impact on infrastructure planning, specifically triggering the need for the Storm Drain Master Plan. This catastrophic event resulted in federal assistance and funding aimed at improving the storm drainage systems in the affected areas. The relationship underscores the connection between natural disasters and subsequent governmental responses to enhance community resilience through infrastructure development.
community_summary.34: The relationship between "Completion Date" and "Spring 2022" indicates that the project is expected to be completed during this specific time frame. The term "is scheduled for" emphasizes the planned nature of this completion date, reinforcing its significance in project timelines. Overall, the relationship highlights the anticipation of project completion in Spring 2022.
community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
community_summary.36:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure** and **Los Angeles County Flood Control**: The Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure project is dependent on obtaining a maintenance agreement from the Los Angeles County Flood Control organization, which is essential for the project's construction to move forward.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.

The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph highlight key projects and their interconnections:

1. **Slope Repairs** and **Malibu Road**: The Slope Repairs project is specifically focused on Malibu Road, indicating that the repairs are directly related to the condition of this location.

2. **Malibu Road** and **Slope Repairs**: Similarly, Malibu Road is identified as the area of focus for the Slope Repairs project, reinforcing the direct connection between the repairs and the road's condition.

3. **Birdview Avenue Improvements** and **Malibu Park Drainage Improvements**: The Birdview Avenue Improvements project is included within the Malibu Park Drainage Improvements project, demonstrating a direct relationship between these two initiatives.

4. **Malibu Park Drainage Improvements** and **Birdview Avenue Improvements**: The inclusion of Birdview Avenue Improvements in the Malibu Park Drainage Improvements project further emphasizes the interconnectedness of these projects.

Overall, the summary illustrates how specific repair and improvement projects are geographically and functionally linked, particularly focusing on the areas of Malibu Road and Birdview Avenue within the broader context of drainage improvements in Malibu Park.

The relationship emphasizes the critical role of the Project Consultant in managing and guiding the project's development.
community_summary.39:
The summary of relationships involving the City is as follows:

1. **Disaster Recovery Projects**: The City manages Disaster Recovery Projects aimed at restoring and improving services and infrastructure following disasters, highlighting its commitment to community resilience.

2. **Collaboration with Caltrans**: The City has engaged in discussions with Caltrans regarding project phasing, showcasing a collaborative effort in managing transportation-related projects.

3. **Evaluation of Construction Bids**: The City received and evaluated construction bids for a project but ultimately rejected them due to a budget shortfall, illustrating its active role in the procurement process and fiscal responsibility.

4. **Collaboration with the Planning Department**: The City is working alongside the Planning Department to secure CEQA clearance for various projects, indicating a cooperative approach to urban planning and regulatory compliance.

5. **Contract with Kimley Horn**: The City has formalized a contract with Kimley Horn to conduct a traffic study, reflecting its initiative to enhance traffic management through expert analysis.

6. **Traffic Signals Infrastructure**: The City maintains traffic signals as part of its infrastructure, which are essential for managing vehicular flow and ensuring public safety on the roads.

Overall, these relationships demonstrate the City's proactive management of infrastructure, collaboration with key agencies, and commitment to effective urban planning and disaster recovery.
community_summary.40: In the relationship between the "Contractor" and "Trancas Canyon Park," the Contractor is tasked with overseeing and managing the construction activities at the park. This highlights the Contractor's role as a key figure in ensuring that the construction processes are effectively executed at this specific location.
community_summary.41: The Westward Beach Road Repair Project is set to enter the Begin Construction phase, which is scheduled to follow the Complete Design phase. This indicates a structured and sequential approach to the project activities, highlighting the importance of completing the design before moving on to construction. The relationship emphasizes the organized progression of the project, ensuring that each phase is completed in the correct order for successful implementation.

The relationships outlined highlight various infrastructure projects and their components within a community development context. 

1. **PCH Median Improvements** includes enhancements at **Zuma Beach**, indicating a focus on improving both the roadway and the beach area, thereby enhancing local accessibility and aesthetics.

2. The **Malibu Park Resurfacing Project** encompasses **Busch Drive**, emphasizing the importance of this road within the overall project aimed at upgrading park facilities and access.

3. The **Citywide Asphalt Concrete Berms Repairs** project includes a critical **Design** phase, which is essential for planning and executing the necessary repairs before construction can commence.

4. The **Storm Drain Master Plan** is part of the larger **Capital Improvement and Disaster Recovery Projects**, signifying its role in enhancing the community's infrastructure resilience and disaster preparedness.

Overall, these relationships illustrate a comprehensive approach to urban development, focusing on infrastructure improvements that enhance both functionality and community well-being.

The relationships outlined involve key entities such as the Public Works and Public Safety Commission, the City Council, and the City, focusing on the approval processes for projects.

1. **Public Works and Public Safety Commission -> City Council**: The commission is presenting a project to the City Council for direction and approval, highlighting a formal relationship where the commission seeks the council's endorsement for its initiatives.

2. **PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements Project -> City**: This project necessitates material approvals from the City, establishing a direct relationship where the City holds the authority to grant the necessary permissions for the project's advancement.

Overall, these relationships underscore the collaborative framework between the Public Works and Public Safety Commission and the City Council, as well as the critical role of the City in approving significant projects like the PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements.

The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **FEMA and CalOES**: These two entities collaborate to approve disaster recovery projects, such as the Latigo Canyon Road Retaining Wall Repair Project. Their partnership ensures that federal and state resources are effectively aligned for emergency management.

2. **Civic Center Water Treatment Facility and State Water Board**: The Civic Center Water Treatment Facility is engaged in collaboration with the State Water Board to review cultural resources as part of its funding application process. This partnership is crucial for ensuring compliance and thorough evaluation during the funding application.

3. **Civic Center Water Treatment Facility and Federal Funding**: The Civic Center Water Treatment Facility has submitted a request for federal funding to support its project, highlighting its initiative to secure financial resources for development and improvement efforts.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the importance of collaboration between governmental entities and the proactive steps taken by facilities to secure funding and ensure effective project management.

The relationship underscores the project's reliance on agency approval to move forward.
community_summary.47:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.
community_summary.48: The Corral Canyon Culvert Repairs project was cancelled due to the inability to secure approval from FEMA. This highlights a significant relationship where the project's status is directly influenced by FEMA's decision-making process.
community_summary.49: The Birdview Avenue Improvements project is overseen by CalOES, establishing a direct management relationship between the project and the California Office of Emergency Services (CalOES). This indicates that CalOES is responsible for the administration and execution of the improvements on Birdview Avenue.

community_summary.51:
The relationships involving the City highlight its multifaceted role in managing public infrastructure and safety initiatives. 

1. **Capital Improvements Projects**: The City manages and oversees various Capital Improvements Projects aimed at enhancing public infrastructure, demonstrating its commitment to community development.

2. **Staff Employment**: The City employs staff who are integral to its operations, indicating a structured municipal organization that relies on its workforce to implement various projects and services.

3. **FEMA Hazard Mitigation Grant**: The City has been awarded a FEMA Hazard Mitigation grant, which signifies its role as a recipient of federal funding aimed at improving disaster resilience and safety measures.

4. **Emergency Warning Sirens**: The City oversees the implementation of the Emergency Warning Sirens project, which includes managing project activities and applying for future funding to ensure the system's effectiveness in public safety.

Overall, these relationships underscore the City's responsibilities in infrastructure management, staff employment, disaster preparedness, and public safety initiatives.
community_summary.52:
The relationships outlined involve the entity "Construction Bids" and its connection to the timeline of construction activities. 

1. **Construction Bids** are set to **initiate** the commencement of construction, which is expected to begin in **Fall 2022**. This indicates that the bidding process is a precursor to the actual construction work.

2. The **Scheduled To Begin** phase is linked to **Construction Bids** in **Spring 2022**, highlighting that bids will be solicited during this period in preparation for the construction that is anticipated to start in Fall 2022.

In summary, the construction bidding process is a critical step that will lead to the start of construction in Fall 2022, with bids being actively solicited in Spring 2022 to facilitate this timeline.
community_summary.53: The CalOES Project is a significant initiative focused on infrastructure improvements, specifically involving the repairs to Westward Beach Road. The project has a defined timeline, with the completion of the design phase for the Malibu Road slope repairs scheduled for Summer 2022. This timeline underscores the project's progress and its connection to the specific location of Westward Beach Road, highlighting the importance of these repairs in enhancing the area's infrastructure.

The relationship highlights the impact of the Woolsey Fire on local infrastructure, emphasizing the need for subsequent repair efforts.
